noRedundantStateFinding: Searched existing light/object projections before adding state. Existing selected-spell and Starry Wisp adapters contain witness/projection values, but no generic BattleState owner for object-attached or held light emitter lifecycle. Table-owned object validity, geometry, cover, opaque blocker, presentation, and durability facts remain adapter witness facts and were not duplicated as production state.
